reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Lo que sí y más en temporada suele haber mucha cola para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. What's more, especially during peak season, there's usually a long line to fill up with fuel.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's always busy, but they serve you quickly.

reviews.comment:
Siempre me atendien muy bien, pero es extremadamente lento y también me parece super peligroso las largas filas que se hacen hacia el lado de la rotonda.
Quizá con cambiar el sentido de la fila, se haría un cambio importante.

(Translated by Google)
I always receive excellent service, but it's extremely slow, and I also find the long lines that form towards the roundabout extremely dangerous. Perhaps changing the direction of the line would make a significant difference.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0d0pXNzRBRRAB
